incident.summary: RangeTrader emitted a long support_bounce BUY at $4779 while the D1 SMA50 slope was -0.057 %/bar (bearish) and close was 2.1% below SMA50. The R9 P0-A long-trend filter (range_trader._trend_filter_should_block) was added to block longs when D1 trend is materially down.
incident.evidence: Production journal entry showed `RANGE BUY direction=long entry=4779.x` with the broken-range D1 context; trade SL'd within an hour.

trend_signals.comment: Both magnitudes exceed the R9 P0-A thresholds (|slope|>=0.05 AND |close_distance|>=1.0). _trend_filter_should_block must return True for direction=long.

thresholds.comment: Documented here so the fixture is self-contained — actual constants live in smc.strategy.range_trader._TREND_FILTER_*
